EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An alert is generated for a MISC attack from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port}
A MISC attack from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} is detected and logged
A MISC attack from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} is blocked
A MISC attack from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} is rejected
